conceptReference: north-star Gear Key crop: round gear bow, missing teeth, central hub, aged bronze shaft, lower side bit, dark background
verdict: PASS as Unity-only generation pipeline proof; FAIL as exact final concept match and not ready for playable promotion except temporary placeholder use.

assets.notes: Base color map with bronze, soot, verdigris, worn gold edges, stains, and dark pitting.
Normal map with micro scratches, hammer pitting, and worn directional ridges.
Metallic/smoothness mask with uneven polish and tarnished low-sheen pockets.
Crevice/pit occlusion map for blackened recesses.
Warm black grime map for gear holes, shaft mouth, deep seams, and side-bit notches.
Low-polish oily black mask.
Subtle desaturated brass edge-highlight map, not saturated orange.
Dark worn cloth/stone reference backdrop for render-only proof views.
Primary dark antique brass/bronze material for bow, shaft, teeth, collars, and bit.
Dark grime and hollow openings used to keep the key from reading as clean toy brass.
Selective warmer worn metal on high rims, tooth tips, collars, and scratch streaks.
Darker brass variant for recessed inner ring, underside collars, and worn bit shadows.
Render-only dark background matching the crop's low-key studio card.
